name: undoomed-vscode
description: Socratic hints (never the answer) on the file you're editing, then a style review once the logic is clean. Talks to your Un-Doomed server.

commands.title: Un-Doomed: Set Task Description for This File

undoomed.serverUrl.description: Base URL of your Un-Doomed server (local `undoom serve` or a deployed instance).

undoomed.provider.description: AI provider. Leave blank to use the server's default.

undoomed.model.description: Model API id (e.g. gpt-4o-mini). Leave blank for the provider default.

undoomed.apiKey.markdownDescription: Provider API key. **Prefer the `Un-Doomed: Set API Key` command** — it uses VS Code secret storage instead of plain-text settings. This field is only a fallback.

undoomed.serverSecret.description: Shared server secret (X-Server-Secret) — only if your deployed backend requires one.
